channel.title: World
channel.description: The Washington Post World section provides information and analysis of breaking world news stories. In addition to our world news and video, Post World News offers discussions and blogs on major international news and economic issues.

item.title: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship to head to Canary Islands as Swiss confirm new case
item.dc:creator: Victoria Craw
item.description: More than 140 people remain on the Hondius, which will take about three days to reach the Spanish archipelago for screening. A local official has criticized the plan.

item.title: Trump orders military to pause Strait of Hormuz mission to allow time for peace talks
item.dc:creator: Tara Copp, Dan Lamothe, Victoria Craw, Cleve R. Wootson Jr.
item.description: Global stocks jumped and oil prices fell in reaction to Trump’s statement, which hailed “Great Progress” toward a peace deal. The mission, dubbed “Project Freedom,” had just begun.

item.title: Trump lashes out at Pope Leo again ahead of Rubio trip to Rome
item.dc:creator: Anthony Faiola
item.description: The criticism of the pontiff’s stance on Iran highlighted what Vatican officials have described as an unprecedented low in relations with the United States.

item.title: Pro-Kremlin lawyer’s turn against Putin reveals rift in Russian power circles
item.dc:creator: Catherine Belton
item.description: Ilya Remeslo was put in a psychiatric hospital after criticizing Vladimir Putin. Now free, he said that he will not stop his crusade against the Russian president.

item.title: U.S. and Iran exchange taunts as attacks imperil fragile ceasefire
item.dc:creator: Susannah George, Tara Copp
item.description: Iran’s foreign minister warned the U.S. should be wary of being dragged into a “quagmire” after tensions flared in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Trump keeps changing his timeline for ending the Iran war
item.dc:creator: Júlia Ledur
item.description: The president has repeatedly suggested that the conflict was nearing a conclusion while simultaneously escalating threats against Tehran.

item.title: Some Democrats press Trump to break silence on Israel’s nuclear arsenal
item.dc:creator: John Hudson
item.description: A letter from 30 lawmakers calls on the U.S. to expose Israel’s weapons program, which it doesn’t acknowledge and was built in secret beginning in the late 1950s.

item.title: Cuba’s mom influencers share rare view of struggles under U.S. fuel embargo
item.dc:creator: Samantha Schmidt
item.description: A growing cohort are using Instagram and TikTok to share unmoderated coverage of the beleaguered island.
